Team","details":"Simpler than the previous BettingMatchFactory \u2014 no LP pool wiring.      Each proxy is initialized with:        - The intended owner (who gets all admin roles).        - The oracle address (who gets RESOLVER_ROLE).        - USDC and fee-recipient set via the factory's config.        - SWAP_ROUTER_ROLE granted to the configured swap router.      The factory itself holds no permanent roles on deployed proxies \u2014      it renounces all roles in the same transaction.      isMatch(address) provides the router with a factory-registry check      before forwarding USDC, preventing fund loss to arbitrary addresses.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"createFootballMatch(string,address,address)":{"params":{"_matchName":"Human-readable name (e.g. \"Barcelona vs Real Madrid\").","_oracle":"Receives RESOLVER_ROLE (result-setting key).","_owner":"Receives all admin roles + Ownable ownership."},"returns":{"proxy":"    Address of the ready-to-use match proxy."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. params._owner: Receives all admin roles + Ownable ownership.

returns.proxy: Address of the ready-to-use match proxy.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

createBasketballMatch(string,address,add.notice: Deploy, initialize, and fully wire a BasketballPariMatch proxy.

createFootballMatch(string,address,addre.notice: Deploy, initialize, and fully wire a FootballPariMatch proxy.

feeRecipient().notice: Platform fee recipient passed to every new match.

swapRouter().notice: Swap router granted SWAP_ROUTER_ROLE on every new match.

usdcToken().notice: USDC token address passed to every new match.
